...\f
Huh? It’s already become so
bright outside!\f
HGSS.216.0002:
...
...\f
Yaaaaawn...
...\f
Huh? What?! Is it already that late?!
Oh no! I overslept!\f
HGSS.216.0003:
...
...\f
Hmm. Looks like the sun is descending
in the sky...\f
...So this would be what is called
“twilight,” wouldn’t it?\f
HGSS.216.0004:
...
...\f
Hmm... Interesting...
...\f
Huh? Oh! Excuse me, sorry!
I was just reading this book here.\f
HGSS.216.0005:
...
...\f
Yaaaaaaawn...
...\f
Huh? A guest?
At this hour?\f
HGSS.216.0006:
Sorry to keep you waiting!\f
Welcome to the world of Pokémon!\f
My name is Professor Oak.\f
But everyone calls me the
Pokémon Professor.\f
Before we go any further, I’d like to
tell you a few things you should\r
know about this world!\f
HGSS.216.0007:
I will first tell you important
things about this game.

Please touch any topic you’d like
to know more about on the
lower screen.
HGSS.216.0009:
I’ll explain this game’s controls.

You can control this game by
touching the lower screen, also
called the Touch Screen.

Please touch the panel in the
bottom right of the Touch Screen.
HGSS.216.0010:
By touching the Touch Screen
like this, you can confirm
selections and advance
conversations.
HGSS.216.0011:
You can also advance by pressing
the A Button when you see the
A Button icon on the Touch Screen.
HGSS.216.0012:
Different touch buttons will appear
on the Touch Screen depending on
the situation.
HGSS.216.0013:
Next, I’ll explain the button
operations.

You can move the main character
around on the screen using the
+Control Pad.
HGSS.216.0014:
Next, I’ll explain about buttons.

Use the +Control Pad to move
the main character.

You can also use the +Control
Pad to select entries.
HGSS.216.0015:
You can operate the screens using
buttons instead of touching the
Touch Screen.
HGSS.216.0016:
Used to confirm a choice, check
things, chat, and scroll text.

Used to exit, cancel a choice,
and cancel a mode.
HGSS.216.0017:
Use this to move within menus.

Press to use a Key Item, such
as a Bicycle, that has been
registered in advance.
HGSS.216.0023:
If this mark is shown in the
message window, there are active
buttons you can touch on the
Touch Screen below.
HGSS.216.0026:
Do you understand everything
so far? [0200,0000]
HGSS.216.0028:
You are about to enter a world
where you will embark on a grand
adventure of your very own.
HGSS.216.0029:
Speak to people and check things
wherever you go, be it in towns,
roads, or caves.
Gather information and hints from
every possible source.
HGSS.216.0030:
New paths will open to you when
you help people in need, overcome
challenges, and solve mysteries.
HGSS.216.0031:
At times, you will be challenged
by others to a battle.
At other times, wild creatures
may stand in your way.

By overcoming such hurdles,
you will gain great power.
HGSS.216.0032:
However, your adventure is not
solely about becoming powerful.
HGSS.216.0033:
On your travels, we hope that
you will meet countless people
and, through them, achieve
personal growth.

This is the most important
objective of this adventure.
HGSS.216.0034:
This world is widely inhabited by
creatures known as Pokémon.\f
HGSS.216.0035:
We humans live alongside Pokémon
as friends.\f
At times we play together, and at
other times we work together.\f
Some people use their Pokémon to
battle and develop closer bonds\r
with them.\f
HGSS.216.0036:
Now, why don’t you tell me a little bit
about yourself?\f
HGSS.216.0037:
Are you a boy?
Or are you a girl?\r
Won’t you please tell me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.216.0043:
[0103,0000,0000]!
Are you ready?\f
Your very own tale of grand adventure
is about to unfold.\f
Fun experiences, difficult experiences,
there’s so much waiting for you!\f
Dreams! Adventure!
Let’s go to the world of Pokémon!\f
I’ll see you later!\f
